nodes.label: Arrive_at_Dragon_Rest
nodes.description: Ship approaches the harbor on the island's north side

nodes.label: Reach_Shipyard
nodes.description: Sailors row the party ashore at the rickety dock

nodes.label: Explore_Climbing_Path
nodes.description: Path winds up the cliffside to the temple with carved doorways

nodes.label: Discover_Open_Air_Temple
nodes.description: Towering statue of a wizened man surrounded by seven songbirds revealed

nodes.label: Curious Inquiry
nodes.description: Kobolds barrage the party with questions upon their arrival.

nodes.label: Combat Against Zombies
nodes.description: Characters fight zombies at the beach, prompting Elder Runara's shift from indifference to friendship.

nodes.label: Revelation of True Identity
nodes.description: Residents of the cloister know Elder Runara's true identity as a bronze dragon but withhold this knowledge from visitors.

nodes.label: Social Interaction Change
nodes.description: Elder Runara's attitude shifts from indifference to hostility if characters harm residents, requiring reconciliation.

nodes.label: Tattoo Symbol Recognition
nodes.description: Character identifies the Gilded Gallows insignia on Tarak's tattoos after succeeding on an Intelligence (History) check.

nodes.label: Guardian Encounters
nodes.description: Myconid-guardians prevent access to mushroom groves, creating a quest challenge for the party.

nodes.label: Hostile Interaction
nodes.description: Tarak's demeanor shifts to hostility when questioned about his criminal past.

nodes.label: Ship_Crash_Discovery
nodes.description: Varnoth witnesses a ship altering its course and crashing into northern rocks

nodes.label: Pursuit
nodes.description: Zombies pursue fleeing residents of Dragon's Rest along the lower path

nodes.label: Dialogue_with_Tarak
nodes.description: Tarak informs the party about the myconids’ plight and assigns them a quest.

nodes.label: Quest_to_Recover_Mushrooms
nodes.description: The party is tasked with investigating the myconids and returning heart cap mushrooms.

nodes.label: Guardian_Encounter_Prep
nodes.description: Tarak warns of the fungal octopus guardian blocking access to the caves.

nodes.label: Potion_Delivery
nodes.description: Tarak gifts the party two Potions of Healing.

nodes.label: Scaling Difficulty Adjustment
nodes.description: Adjust combat challenges based on whether players completed earlier chapters

nodes.label: Exploration_of_Shipwrecks
nodes.description: Characters investigate other shipwrecks, uncovering zombies, giant octopuses, and other hazards.

nodes.label: Zombie_Encounter
nodes.description: Sailors animated by a talisman in Compass Rose's hold ambush intruders in submerged vessels.

nodes.label: Giant_Octopus_Danger
nodes.description: Sunken shipwrecks host colossal octopuses resembling spore servant octopuses.

nodes.label: Ghoul_Discovery
nodes.description: Hidden threats within wrecks include ghouls, undead remnants of lost crews.

nodes.label: Boarding Instructions
nodes.description: Characters learn about accessing the wreck via rowboat or underwater entrance

nodes.label: Destruction of Clifftop Observatory
nodes.description: Runara battles her blue dragon rival, destroying the observatory.

nodes.label: Aidron's Confrontation with Sparkrender
nodes.description: Aidron meets Sparkrender and engages in combat, ultimately being captured.

nodes.label: Imprisonment of Aidron
nodes.description: Sparkrender imprisons Aidron in the observatory ruins.

nodes.label: Ritual Preparation
nodes.description: Sparkrender begins planning a ritual to summon the spirits of dead dragons, requiring Aidron's sacrifice.

nodes.label: Travel Options Description
nodes.description: Describes three methods to reach the Clifftop Observatory via boat, coastal walk, or overland path

nodes.label: Description
nodes.description: Text describes a path leading to the cliff edge and an overlook marked by golden-marble dragon statues

nodes.label: Combat_with_Batlike_Creatures_and_Kobolds
nodes.description: Two winged kobolds fight desperately against six batlike creatures that swarm around them.

nodes.label: Activate_Energy_Bridge
nodes.description: Using the moonstone key activates the energy bridge across the 22-foot gap between the rotunda and spire.

nodes.label: Statue Alignment Puzzle
nodes.description: Rotating statues to match the Dragon of Dawn constellation unlocks a hidden staircase to the secret archive.

nodes.label: Staircase Closure Mechanism
nodes.description: Misaligning any statue triggers the staircase to rise, sealing the library compartment.

nodes.label: Treasure_Discovery
nodes.description: Characters collect Sparkrender's treasure including coins, gems, and personal effects

nodes.label: Discovery Of Magical Items
nodes.description: Character discovers +1 battleaxe or spell scroll of hold person after successful intelligence check

nodes.label: Detect Magic Revelation
nodes.description: Detect magic spell reveals location of hidden items without requiring ability check
